🏭

Producer · Web

Atık Üreticisi dashboard — Coming soon. The producer surface handles tender creation, bid review, shipment tracking, and recycler ratings. Currently 4 screens in Figma; full UI kit pending Figma expansion.

Mapped screens: Dashboard, İhale Oluştur, Değerlendirme
See docs/figma/design-spec.md § 4.3
